title: eriospermum zeyheri
intro: Eriospermum zeyheri is a species of plant in the family Asparagaceae, commonly known as the 'Cape spike-rush' or 'Purple-berried spike-rush', characterized by its distinctive purple berries and narrow, pointed leaves. Traditionally, Eriospermum zeyheri has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriospermum zeyheri are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Eriospermum zeyheri are typically made by infusing the roots or leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
